description_long: This is a historic stone wall fountain set into a brick and stone masonry backdrop, featuring a pointed Gothic arch framing the basin. The basin itself is semi-circular and supported by a short, cylindrical pedestal with a spiral fluting pattern. Above the basin, a sculpted spout in the form of an animal or grotesque head is set into the arch, intended to dispense water into the basin below. The stonework is weathered, with visible discoloration and moss or lichen growth at the base, suggesting age and outdoor exposure. The fountain is integrated into a vertical wall, with the surrounding pavement made of cobblestones. The overall appearance is that of a traditional European street or courtyard fountain, likely found in historic urban settings.
description: A weathered stone wall fountain with a Gothic arch, semi-circular basin, and sculpted spout, set into a brick and stone wall. The basin is supported by a fluted pedestal and surrounded by cobblestone paving.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full Gothic arch, sculpted spout, semi-circular basin, and fluted pedestal, with the brick and stone wall backdrop clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the shallow depth of the fountain, the protrusion of the basin, and the thickness of the wall structure.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the wall and the arch, with less detail on the basin and spout, highlighting the structure's integration into the wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the basin's projection and the cobblestone paving at the base, with the arch and wall thickness visible.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features a pointed Gothic arch and a sculpted spout resembling an animal or grotesque head. The pedestal supporting the basin is decorated with spiral fluting, and the stonework is aged and textured, adding to its historic character.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is semi-circular, moderately deep, and supported by a short, fluted cylindrical pedestal. Its rim is simple and unadorned, with no visible tiering or compartments.
attribute_surrounding_landscaping: No visible surrounding landscaping; the fountain is set directly into a stone wall with cobblestone paving at its base.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present; the spout is designed for a single stream of water to flow into the basin.
